description:
Integrate TanStack Query or SWR to cache API responses in memory. Serve cached data instantly while silently refetching in background. Add smart cache invalidation on mutations.

**Rationale:** Eliminates loading spinners on repeat visits, cuts redundant network calls 60-80%, and enables optimistic UI updates.
title: API query caching with stale-while-revalidate
